name: content-pipeline
description: Multi-stage content production from brief to polished output

tasks.subject: Create content outline from brief
tasks.description: Read /home/shared/inputs/brief.md and produce a detailed outline with sections, key points, and target audience. Write outline to /home/shared/outline.md

tasks.subject: Research supporting material
tasks.description: Read /home/shared/outline.md and any source material in /home/shared/inputs/. Produce structured research notes in /home/shared/research/. Register each file as an artifact.

tasks.subject: Write the first draft
tasks.description: Using /home/shared/outline.md and /home/shared/research/, write a complete first draft. Save to /home/shared/draft.md and register as artifact.

tasks.subject: Edit and polish the draft
tasks.description: Review /home/shared/draft.md for clarity, consistency, grammar, and tone. Produce the final version at /home/shared/outputs/final.md and register as artifact.

mail.subject: Swarm started: content-pipeline
mail.body:
You are leading a content production pipeline. Your first task (outline) is ready on the task board.

Topic: ${TOPIC:-unspecified}

Check the brief at /home/shared/inputs/brief.md if available, otherwise create an outline based on the topic above.

Run: task.sh ready --owner $(whoami)
